results.justification: EXACT TWIN — HERMES multi-stage RAG+KV+reasoning+prefill+decode orchestration IS the 4-stage sequential context-gating pipeline mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Dual-Gated SFT + bounded optimization IS the stage-completion-required cedar-water gate threshold mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — IDK + YES/NO cost-uncertainty gating cascade IS the conductor-at-door master-gate arbitration + stage-completion threshold mechanism.
Multi-step reasoning survey covers staged pipeline + completion-criteria mechanisms in candidate.
Preplan-and-anchor rhythm + local/global attention heads overlaps with 4-direction rotation per stage + drum-heartbeat anchor mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — SinkTrack BOS-anchor injection + plug-and-play IS the drum-heartbeat low-freq attention-sink anchor mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Self-Anchor step-by-step attention-alignment + confidence-based stage IS the 4-stage completion-required attention-alignment mechanism.
Multimodal positional encoding rotation/orientation overlaps with 4-direction 90-degree attention rotation per stage.
